mermaidSyntax:
timeline
  title Phase III Clinical Trial Timeline
  section Screening
    Week -4 : Informed Consent
    Week -2 : Eligibility Assessment
    Week 0  : Baseline Measurements : Randomization
  section Treatment Period
    Week 4  : Follow-up Visit
    Week 12 : Follow-up Visit
    Week 26 : Follow-up Visit
    Week 52 : Primary Endpoint : Follow-up Visit
  section Extension
    Week 56 : Safety Follow-up
    Week 104: Extension Complete

failures.description: No branching pattern detected — no node has 2+ outgoing arrows
failures.suggestedFix: Ensure the AI generates branch points where the input describes parallel paths

failures.description: Treatment and/or control arm not represented
failures.suggestedFix: Ensure both arms are shown as parallel branches after randomization

failures.description: No color or styling definitions in Mermaid syntax
failures.suggestedFix: Add classDef or style directives for visual distinction
